overall_reasoning: Early market open on May 1st. Key catalysts: QCOM soared 15% on stellar Q2 earnings, AAPL beat earnings with positive sentiment, LLY raised guidance with analyst upgrades, ABBV got BofA upgrade on Skyrizi strength, and SBUX turnaround investment driving positive sentiment. Portfolio is nearly fully invested at 99% with only $1,134 cash. I need to trim underperformers to fund higher-conviction opportunities, particularly rotating into QCOM (which I already hold but just had a massive earnings beat) and adding to names with fresh catalysts. Being first run of the day, I'll be measured — using ~10-12 trades and saving budget for later runs.

raw_decisions.summary: Adding to QCOM after stellar Q2 earnings beat with stock soaring 15%, strong mobile and AI chip demand catalysts, confidence 8/10.
raw_decisions.reasoning: QCOM posted a blowout Q2 with 15% post-earnings surge per headlines. Currently at 3.85% weight with -1.91% unrealized P&L, but the earnings catalyst changes the picture entirely. The pre-market move suggests significant upside. Increasing to 7% to capture the momentum while remaining disciplined.

raw_decisions.summary: Adding to ABBV on BofA upgrade citing Skyrizi strength and lifted price target, positive sentiment at +0.49, confidence 7/10.
raw_decisions.reasoning: BofA just upgraded ABBV with a PT lift on Skyrizi strength. Sentiment is the highest in the portfolio at +0.49. Currently at 4.18% with +6.84% unrealized gain. Increasing to 6% to ride the upgrade catalyst.

raw_decisions.reasoning: Starbucks invested $500M in turnaround and sentiment is strong at +0.34. Currently small at 1.94%. Adding slightly to 3% as the turnaround narrative gains traction. Will monitor for further confirmation.

raw_decisions.reasoning: Visa capturing 90% of crypto card spending which surged 500% to $600M monthly is a meaningful new revenue driver. Morgan Stanley adjusted PT post-earnings. Sentiment flipped positive. Moving from 3% to 4%.
